target.title: fix: avoid DeepSeek-native thinking on OpenRouter V4
target.body: Fixes #97196 ## What Problem This Solves Fixes an issue where users running OpenRouter-routed DeepSeek V4 models could hit a 400 response because OpenClaw sent both OpenRouter reasoning controls and DeepSeek-native thinking controls in the same request. ## Why This Change Was Made OpenRouter DeepSeek V4 requests now stay on the OpenRouter reasoning payload shape (`reasoning.effort`) instead of adding DeepSeek-native `thinking` / `reasoning_effort` fields after the provider wrapper runs. The DeepSeek V4 replay repair still backfills `reasoning_content` only when OpenRouter reasoning remains enabled, and the core fallback now respects detected non-native thinking formats so unowned DeepSeek-compatible proxy routes keep their native fallback without breaking OpenRouter. ## User Impact Users can use `openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash` and `openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro` without the request being rejected for conflicting reasoning fields. `/think max` and stale max overrides still map to OpenRouter's supported `xhigh` effort. ## Evidence - `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/openrouter/index.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/extra-params.deepseek-v4-thinking-format.test.ts` - `extensions/openrouter/index.test.ts`: 43 passed - `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/extra-params.deepseek-v4-thinking-format.test.ts`: 9 passed - Covers both `openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash` and `openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro` payload wrapping. - `pnpm docs:list` - `git diff --check` - `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` - clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported Live OpenRouter DeepSeek V4 Flash proof: - Command shape, with the API key kept in the environment and not printed: `OPENCLAW_DEBUG_PROXY_ENABLED=1 OPENCLAW_DEBUG_PROXY_SESSION_ID=openrouter-v4-payload-proof-1782549892 OPENCLAW_DEBUG_MODEL_TRANSPORT=1 OPENCLAW_DEBUG_MODEL_PAYLOAD=full-redacted pnpm openclaw --no-color agent --local --agent main --session-key agent:main:openrouter-v4-payload-proof-direct --model openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash --thinking xhigh --message "Reply with exactly: openrouter deepseek v4 proof"` - Terminal result: ```text [provider-transport-fetch] [model-fetch] start provider=openrouter api=openai-completions model=deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash method=POST url=https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions timeoutMs=undefined proxy=none policy=custom [provider-transport-fetch] [model-fetch] response provider=openrouter api=openai-completions model=deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash status=200 elapsedMs=7360 contentType=text/event-stream openrouter deepseek v4 proof [agent] run 596eee2d-d90b-4227-a46c-974b90d8f6e8 ended with stopReason=stop ``` - Captured guarded-fetch request event from the same run: ```json { "direction": "outbound", "kind": "request", "method": "POST", "host": "openrouter.ai", "path": "/api/v1/chat/completions", "content_type": "application/json", "data_sha256": "d8d51a60386add5ba607082eda654829b0333e46113f8317b292369ab165ab1e", "meta": { "captureOrigin": "guarded-fetch", "provider": "openrouter", "api": "openai-completions", "model": "deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash" } } ``` - Redacted final outbound payload summary from that captured request body: ```json { "model": "deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash", "topLevelFields": [ "max_completion_tokens", "messages", "model", "reasoning", "stream", "tool_choice", "tools" ], "reasoning": { "effort": "high" }, "hasReasoningEffort": false, "hasThinking": false, "messageCount": 2, "stream": true } ``` The captured body proves the final wire payload keeps nested `reasoning.effort` and omits both top-level `reasoning_effort` and `thinking`. Live OpenRouter DeepSeek V4 proof screenshot: the request reached OpenRouter for `deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash`, returned status=200, and produced the expected reply without the previous conflicting reasoning-fields error.
target.author: nianjiuzst
